description: Composition:Black leatherette handbag with chain handlebag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a mild leather cleanerThis sleek black murcia bag, with sharp edges and a chain handle, has great rock star appeal. A great evening bag, it is guaranteed to go with your party clothes. Convenient to hold and roomy enough to carry all your essentials, this is the perfect bag to carry when you go partying.
